Gun
owners
of California
CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE

951 ARRAN WAY • SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95815

September 21, 1976

Mrs. Gina Siciliano-Kutchins
Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 "K" Street Mall
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Gina:

This will confirm our telephone conversation
of September 15th regarding a mail-out to our membership.

Our understanding is that a mail-out, to our
members only, naming candidates endorsed by our committee
is not considered an "in-kind" contribution to the
candidates listed.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,

Donna Reddick

DONNA REDDICK
State Legislative Field Representative

DR:mm

A Political Committee dedicated to crime control not gun control—and organized to defeat anti-gun politicians.

Printed by SIERRA COPY • 2031 J Street • Sacramento, CA

I can see this is a very faint document image with minimal visible text. The only clearly legible marking appears to be a date stamp or reference number in the upper right corner that reads something like "10 1823" or similar.

The rest of the document appears to be either blank or contains text that is too faint or degraded to read reliably in this image. Rather than guess at illegible content, I should note:

[Most of document content is illegible or blank]

Visible marking: [illegible date/reference number in upper right]

WESSON Dan Wesson Arms, Inc MASON WILLIAMS **951 ARDEN WAY • SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95815** September 21, 1976 Mrs. Gina Siciliano-Kutchins Fair Political Practices Commission 1100 "K" Street Mall Sacramento, CA 95814 Dear Gina: This will confirm our telephone conversation of September 15th regarding a mail-out to our membership. Our understanding is that a mail-out, to our members only, naming candidates endorsed by our committee is not considered an "in-kind" contribution to the candidates listed. Thank you for your assistance in this matter. Sincerely, [Signature] DONNA REDDICK State Legislative Field Representative The image provided is extremely faint and mostly illegible, with very little visible text or content that can be reliably transcribed.
